text: 2199 - وَ اِسْتَغْفَرَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِلْمُحَلِّقِينَ ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ لِلْمُقَصِّرِينَ مَرَّةً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2199 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, sought forgiveness for those who shaved their heads three times and for those who trimmed their hair once.
